name: Zurich Rock 'n' Roll Madrid Half Marathon
summary: Half marathon through central Madrid from Paseo de la Castellana to the Salamanca district, Gran Vía, and finishing on Paseo de Recoletos.
heroNote: Great cheering spots along Paseo de la Castellana, near Calle de O'Donnell, and on Gran Vía close to the finish.
specialNote: The organization divides runners into multiple start corrals based on predicted finish time. The listed start time is for the first corral — your actual start may be later.
